reasoning_content: We need to determine if 793 is prime. Check divisibility: by 2? no odd. 3? sum digits 7+9+3=19, not divisible by 3. 5? ends with 3, no. 7? 7*113=791, remainder 2, so not divisible. 11? 7-9+3=1, not multiple of 11. 13? 13*61=793? 13*60=780, +13=793, yes exactly. So 793 = 13 * 61, thus composite. Answer no.
